statusDetails.message:
- API rejected schema-compliant request

    Valid data should have been accepted
    Expected: 2xx

[400] Bad Request:

    `{"httpStatusCode":400,"httpStatusDescription":"Bad Request","appErrorCode":"FDR-1000","errors":[{"path":"getAllPublishedFlows.publishedGt","message":"The date cannot be older than 30 days."}]}`

Reproduce with:

    curl -X GET -H 'Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key: [Filtered]' 'https://api.uat.platform.pagopa.it/fdr-org/service/v1/organizations/15376371009/fdrs?flowDate=2026-07-01T12%3A00%3A30.900000Z&page=1&publishedGt=2025-01-01T12%3A00%3A00.0000000%2B00%3A00&size=50&pspId=88888888888&subscription-key=%5BFiltered%5D'
